Skills

  • Languages: Python, Java, Ruby
  • Frameworks: Django, Ruby on Rails
  • IaC & Orchestration: Terraform, CDKTF, Kubernetes, Chef, GitHub Actions
  • Observability: OpenTelemetry, SignalFx, Splunk Cloud, Datadog, New Relic
  • Cloud: AWS (EKS, CloudWatch, VPC, ALB), OCI
  • On-Call & Incident Management: PagerDuty, ECAM dashboards, KPI/SLA monitoring, incident escalation & review

Work Experience

Groove.co/Clari

Staff Software Engineer (SRE) - October 2023 to present
  • Led observability (traces/logs/metrics) platform migration from New Relic, Datadog, and Sumo Logic to SignalFx and Splunk Cloud across 80+ services
  • Integrated OpenTelemetry SDKs with Ruby, JavaScript, and Java applications
  • Built service catalog with automated Kubernetes service syncing, entity validation, and cross-repo PR automation for service ownership; reduced drift between multiple infrastructure services and keeping org-wide systems in sync
  • Designed standardized ECAM dashboards and detectors using CDK for Terraform across 80+ services
  • Established on-call rotations with runbooks, PagerDuty escalation policies, and incident response processes
  • Migrating Chef and Heroku applications over to EKS, including observability enablement across both environments during transition, saving roughly $700k a year
Senior Site Reliability Engineer - April 2022 to October 2023
  • Integrated multiple applications with OAuth2.0/SSO
  • Migrated existing search endpoints to use AWS ElasticSearch/OpenSearch
  • Imported existing company resources into Terraform, creating common modules for those resources
  • Identified, monitored, and improved database latency performance for multiple transactions in Ruby on Rails

Oracle Corporation

Senior Software Engineer (Technical Content/OpenSearch) - June 2019 to April 2022
  • Led Operational Incidents Review board to improve overall operations posture
  • Migrated multiple service environments to use Terraform configuration buildout on Cloud Environments
  • Added support for non-English languages on Oracle Cloud documentation site
  • Migrated majority of Oracle Cloud documentation from MadCap Flare to Oasis DITA formats
Software Engineer (Technical Content) - November 2018 to June 2019
  • Designed, scaled, and operated a Content Deployment Pipeline for multiple different orgs and documentation structures
  • Integrated multiple tools with Oracle's OAuth implementation to improve security
  • Wrote tooling to keep multiple environments up to date with FedRamp patching requirements
Site Reliability Engineer (Object Storage) - July 2017 to November 2018
  • Built, maintained, and supported several different Object Storage clusters with hundreds of nodes
  • Developed and maintained best on-call practices/standards for all engineers
  • Migrated multiple clusters from Layer 7 to Layer 4 Load Balancing solution to ensure higher throughput speeds with less management and configuration
  • Maintained internal configuration and scripting for alarming, DNS, node provisioning, and code deployment

Cisco Systems/Piston Cloud Computing

Software Engineer (Object Storage) - June 2015 to March 2017
  • Designed and deployed both Object and Block Storage solutions for Cisco Cloud
  • Maintained, built, and scaled Ceph storage clusters
  • Designed and built Solidfire, NFS, and Pure Storage clusters
Customer Support Engineer - December 2010 to June 2015
  • As a senior member of the customer success team, responsible for large scale customer OpenStack clusters providing Compute Instances, Authentication, Object Storage, and Block Storage
  • Designed, developed, and maintained in-house On-Call paging application to improve incident response time and engineer on-call experience
  • Troubleshot bugs with company software and upstream OpenStack software
